athlete_id.description: Target athlete; defaults to selected athlete in coach mode, or the only athlete otherwise. Format: i12345 or 12345.

current_weekly_hours.description: Current weekly training hours used as a fallback when current_weekly_load is absent.

current_weekly_load.description: Current weekly TSS/load points. Omit to use explicit documented fallbacks and warnings.

goal_date.description: Required athlete-local YYYY-MM-DD goal/race date. Proposal horizon is capped at 53 inclusive weeks.

goal_type.description: Caller-provided anchor type; v1 does not fetch existing race events.

include_full.description: When true, include all proposal rows after normal response shaping.

max_hours_per_week.description: Hard weekly time cap; infeasible load-derived hours warn instead of exceeding this cap.

sports.description: Caller-provided sport context echoed as assumptions only; no sport allocation is fetched or invented.

start_date.description: Optional athlete-local Monday YYYY-MM-DD start. Must be strictly after athlete-local today; omitted defaults to the next Monday strictly after today.

strength_context.description: Free-form caller-provided strength context echoed as an assumption; not first-class upstream strength data.

target_hours_per_week.description: Target weekly training hours; may cap time targets independently from load.

target_weekly_load.description: Target weekly TSS/load points for the goal build.
